title: BO7 Warzone — weekly challenges (template)
sourceNote: Host this file (or merge these weeklyChallenges into your full manifest). ID scheme: bo7wz-s{season}-w{week}-{slug}. When a new week goes live, bump w## and use new ids so old completions stay tied to the correct week. Optional endsAt is ISO-8601 UTC for your own tracking.

weeklyChallenges.title: Core — assault rifle eliminations
weeklyChallenges.description: Get 30 eliminations with assault rifles in Battle Royale or Resurgence (replace with real text from this week’s in-game menu).

weeklyChallenges.title: Core — top placements
weeklyChallenges.description: Finish in the top 10 three times (example).

weeklyChallenges.title: LTM — featured mode
weeklyChallenges.description: Play 5 matches in the featured playlist (rename when the LTM changes).

weeklyChallenges.title: Weapon challenge — featured gun
weeklyChallenges.description: Get 20 eliminations with [weapon name] using [build restrictions if any] (fill in from weekly UI).
